tools.name: search_research_sources
tools.description: Search approved live or staged retrieval targets for current evidence, repository endpoints, standards, or datasets.

tools.name: fetch_research_source
tools.description: Fetch a previously approved source or repository page to inspect exact text, metadata, or version details before downstream promotion.

tools.name: resolve_data_locator
tools.description: Resolve an accession, dataset identifier, or manifest locator into an approved repository endpoint and verification target before dataset admission.
